channel.title: Comments on: Dogfish Head: Heaven and Hell – Beer America TV, Ep. 77
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: Hey Greg and Steve, thanks for the comments! We just taped a Depth Charge segment last week and it will be up soon. I can't imagine combining that beer with anything as it is so beep and rich already, but I don't doubt that what you're suggesting is good! Love the suggestion, keep them coming!!
item.content:encoded: Hey Greg and Steve, thanks for the comments! We just taped a Depth Charge segment last week and it will be up soon. I can’t imagine combining that beer with anything as it is so beep and rich already, but I don’t doubt that what you’re suggesting is good! Love the suggestion, keep them coming!!

item.title: By: Greg Koeka
item.dc:creator: Greg Koeka
item.description:
I will try this for sure as I am big fan of both these beers. I didn't think to try this but should have b/c my favorite brewpub, Southern/Mountain Sun in Boulder does this with several of their beers. They don't bottle but they will mix them for you, I think I came up with two myself in the last few months but I don't know if they will put them on the "list".
May I make a suggestion for the next mix of beers, Depth Charge from Terrapin & Left Hand. I had this at the 24 Hours of Moab MTB race last weekend and it was amazing. It is their second time doing a collaboration brew but it was one of the best of any type of beer in this genre. You will love the deep coffee and chocolate punch it gives.
item.content:encoded:
I will try this for sure as I am big fan of both these beers. I didn’t think to try this but should have b/c my favorite brewpub, Southern/Mountain Sun in Boulder does this with several of their beers. They don’t bottle but they will mix them for you, I think I came up with two myself in the last few months but I don’t know if they will put them on the “list”.

May I make a suggestion for the next mix of beers, Depth Charge from Terrapin & Left Hand. I had this at the 24 Hours of Moab MTB race last weekend and it was amazing. It is their second time doing a collaboration brew but it was one of the best of any type of beer in this genre. You will love the deep coffee and chocolate punch it gives.

item.title: By: Steve Matthews
item.dc:creator: Steve Matthews
item.description: You dudes are not right. Hairy palms? That ranks right up there with John & Paul sampling the spitoon. Oh my.........
item.content:encoded: You dudes are not right. Hairy palms? That ranks right up there with John & Paul sampling the spitoon. Oh my………
